seo.title: MyShelter — BEATROX Immersive Environment
seo.description: An immersive forest environment created for the Adidas Outdoor MyShelter jacket launch in New York — projection mapping, spatial audio, and low-lying fog in a repurposed bodega space.

og.title: MyShelter — Adidas Immersive Product Launch
og.description: A narrow NYC bodega transformed into a living forest canopy — projection mapping, spatial audio, and fog for the Adidas Outdoor MyShelter jacket launch.

hero.headline: MyShelter
hero.subheadline: A narrow bodega transformed into a living forest canopy — letting visitors experience Adidas Outdoor's MyShelter jacket in the environment it was made for.

metadata.type: Experiential Event, Immersive Environment, Product Launch, Retail Build

body.heading: Design Objective
body.content: To create an experiential immersive environment for the product launch of Adidas Outdoor's MyShelter jacket. The objective was to give people an environment to experience the jacket in the setting where it is best suited — deep within a lush forest canopy.

body.heading: Design Concept
body.content:
The environment was created using projection mapping to transform the walls into a lush inner forest scene. Spatial audio recreated the immersive sounds of the inner forest canopy, and low-lying fog was used to create a sense of discovery and intrigue.

The project also utilized audio-reactive lighting, scenic elements hung from the roof, and custom signage to create a surreal scene to keep visitors entertained as they experienced the new Adidas jacket. The projector was short-throw and hidden within the forest canopy. The projection content was a slowly animating forest scene using forced perspective, making visitors feel like they were gently floating through a peaceful forest — even within a tiny Manhattan space.

body.heading: Design Challenge
body.content: The space was a small and narrow shut-down bodega, previously used for storing old kitchen equipment. The main challenge was to create a fully convincing immersive experience within this tight footprint — while hiding all technical infrastructure from view.

body.heading: Key Features
items: Floor-to-ceiling projection mapping on narrow bodega walls
Forced perspective forest content for depth illusion
Hidden short-throw projector within scenic forest canopy
Spatial audio recreating inner forest soundscape
Low-lying fog for atmosphere and discovery
Custom CNC acrylic and foliage scenic elements
Custom street signage and environmental design

images.alt: MyShelter immersive forest environment — middle section
